name: The Aviator
tagline: Worn by those who move first.
description: Full-grain lamb, hand-selected for natural variation. A silhouette that references the golden era of flight without quoting it. The kind of jacket that gets better with every kilometer.
careInstructions: Wipe clean with a dry cloth. Never machine wash.
Condition with leather balm every 6 months.
Store on a wide shoulder hanger. Never fold.
patinaNote: Lamb darkens and softens along stress lines — collar and cuffs develop first.
